Meaning.En: A machine with moving parts that converts power into motion or mechanical force, typically used to drive vehicles or machinery.
Meaning.Example: The car’s engine stalled on the highway.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả bộ phận chính trong xe hơi, tàu thủy hoặc máy bay tạo ra lực kéo hoặc chuyển động.
Situation.En: The core component in vehicles, ships, or aircraft that generates motion through combustion or other energy conversion.

Meaning.En: A person or thing that provides the driving force or energy behind a process or event.
Meaning.Example: She is the engine of the company’s innovation team.

Situation.Vi: Dùng ẩn dụ để chỉ người hoặc vật thúc đẩy mạnh mẽ một hoạt động hoặc dự án.
Situation.En: Used metaphorically to describe the primary driving force behind a project, movement, or organization.
